title: Mega Man X
prompt:
Original illustration inspired by a retro Adventure game.

A compact armored android with an arm-mounted blaster in a ruined elevated highway at dusk with broken road slabs, warning lights, and a burning skyline, standing ready before a charge into the collapsing route ahead.

Visual focus:
- one clear subject
- strong silhouette
- readable in 1 second
- exactly one primary focal subject
- no crowd, no collage, no multi-character scene

Style:
- SNES aesthetic, rich pixel art, layered backgrounds, soft gradients, and readable 16-bit atmosphere
- pixel art or stylized rendering depending on platform
- clean and modern interpretation of retro limitations
- limited color palette when relevant

Mood:
- urgent, heroic, mechanical

Composition:
- single android only, one broken highway path, one clear horizon, and sharp industrial contrast
- simple background
- no clutter

Important:
- Do NOT replicate any official character, logo, or design
- Do NOT imitate exact game assets
- Must feel original but clearly inspired by the game's genre and atmosphere

Output:
- high clarity
- strong contrast
- minimal noise
- no text
- no watermark

Important - do NOT include: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid Mega Man X armor likeness, avoid exact helmet fins, avoid official blaster design, avoid sigma-like villain silhouettes, avoid resemblance to mega man. No copyrighted characters, no logos, no recognizable IP.
negative_prompt: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid Mega Man X armor likeness, avoid exact helmet fins, avoid official blaster design, avoid sigma-like villain silhouettes, avoid resemblance to mega man
revised_prompt: Create a retro-styled illustration in a style reminiscent of 16-bit SNES graphics, conveying a mood of urgency, heroism, and mechanical intrigue. The subject of the image is a compact armored android with an arm-mounted blaster, positioned on a ruined elevated highway at dusk. The highway should be depicted with broken road slabs and warning lights, with a burning skyline as the backdrop. The android stands ready before a charge into the collapsing route ahead. Ensure there is one clear subject, a strong silhouette, and the image is readable within 1 second. Maintain a limited color palette to mimic the limitations of retro games. Use clean and modern interpretations of retro-styled graphics, devoid of clutter, iconic characters, logos, game assets, and costume or weapon designs. There should be no text, official character likeness, or watermarks present within the image.
